title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd!
